choices.text: ~13 minutes (2 consecutive justified epochs). After finalization, reversing requires slashing 1/3+ of validators (~$30B+ economic security). 12s slots, 32-slot epochs.

EIP-4844 (proto-danksharding) added blob transactions. L2s post compressed data as cheap blobs ($0.0001/byte) instead of expensive calldata. Pruned after ~2 weeks. Result: L2 fees dropped 90%+ in 2024.

questions.explanation: EIP-4844 blobs = cheap L2 data posting.
